name: Insight+
description: Ahmini est une plateforme qui permet de décentraliser l'affiliation des femmes rurales au système de couverture sociale adéquat tout en leur facilitant le paiement et leur cotisation en le fragmentant et le rapprochant .
services: Solution de change manuel pour bureaux de change
extra_notes: Insight+ se positionne comme une startup fintech tunisienne pionnière dans la digitalisation du change manuel.

## Who to Watch
![Yahoo! Logo](https://www.cbinsights.com/images/twitter/profile_images/747326716746444800/IRfRHRaE_normal.jpg)
[Yahoo!](https://www.cbinsights.com/company/yahoo)
Yahoo! is a technology company that provides online properties and services to users; and marketing services to advertisers worldwide. Its offerings include the Yahoo! Home Page, My Yahoo!, Yahoo! Toolbar, Yahoo! Local, Yahoo! Finance amongst many others. The company also provides tools for online display advertising, including rich media, video, and targeting.
E
[Exga 3D](https://www.cbinsights.com/company/exga-3d)
Exga 3D creates 3D models of food for events and marketing purposes.
![CarGurus Logo](https://www.cbinsights.com/images/twitter/profile_images/994580944894951426/yU-64rNd_normal.jpg)
[CarGurus](https://www.cbinsights.com/company/cargurus)
CarGurus (NASDAQ: CARG) is an online car shopping platform where users can browse, list, research, and share information about cars.
![DoorDash Logo](https://www.cbinsights.com/images/twitter/profile_images/1026571485425491968/1hgnM-we_normal.jpg)
[DoorDash](https://www.cbinsights.com/company/doordash)
DoorDash (NYSE: DASH) is an on-demand delivery service that connects customers with local businesses. Through the DoorDash marketplace, people can purchase goods from local merchants and have them delivered in less than 45 minutes - thanks to its logistics technology.
![Mixer Logo](https://www.cbinsights.com/images/twitter/profile_images/1070815956233060352/9M84oitZ_normal.jpg)
[Mixer](https://www.cbinsights.com/company/beam1)
Mixer, formerly Beam, is an interactive game streaming service that lets viewers play along with streamers as they watch. Beam's model takes the mostly passive interaction that streaming fans may be used to from services like Twitch and YouTube, and adds the ability for viewers to interact with the streamer via crowdsourced controls.
F
[Fyre Media](https://www.cbinsights.com/company/fyre-media)
Fyre Media is the developer of Fyre, an on-demand service that makes booking the most influential celebrities, artists, athletes, models, and entertainers seamless and transparent. Fyre Media is the company behind the Fyre Festival, a music festival promoted as a luxury getaway in the Bahamas for the wealthy and elite.
